sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Phabel Jesuh aw, na khempeuh na uk hi.
Pasian le mihing ta na hi;
Nangmah kong pahtawi ding uh hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tuk lai-a paak palhte hoih a;
Jesuh hoihzaw hi, Jesuh siang pen a,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ni tang zong hoih a, kha tang zong hoih sem hi.
Jesuh hoih zaw hi, Jesuh hoih pen a,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: A phabel Honpa, mikim Topa Na hi.
Pasian le mita Na hi a;
Nangmah kong pahtawi ding uh hi.
